parsed.summary: Graph is well-formed, acyclic, and satisfies the objective by providing 4 iron_blocks and 1 carved_pumpkin. All vertices are valid inventory items, edge types and consumed flags are correct, and smelting includes proper input, fuel, and workstation. Quantities are consistent (38 raw_iron with 5 coal -> 38 ingots; 36 for blocks + 2 for shears). Tool and workstation dependencies are appropriate. No material defects found.
